claim: YOLO demand router PRD readiness correctly blocks when evidence agents report missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function verified by both explorer and cross-checker to generate blockers for missing evidence (EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING), clarify recommendations (EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED), and blocked/block/failed statuses (EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED).
evidence.why: Core blocking logic independently verified twice with exact line numbers.

evidence.summary: Test 'evidence agent missing data and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness' independently verified by both agents to assert missing array items produce EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING, recommendation 'clarify' produces EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED, and prd_ready becomes false.
evidence.why: Test coverage validated by two independent agents.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness confirmed by both agents to collect all evidence result blocking issues and add them to the blocker list.
prd_ready logic (blockers.length === 0) confirmed by both agents to prevent PRD readiness when any blocker exists.

result.notes: Verifier confirms: explorer and cross-checker results show complete agreement with no conflicts. All evidence has valid project scope with exact paths and line numbers. No assumptions presented as facts. No unresolved missing data. Both agents independently verified the same code paths and test coverage, confirming the claim is factually correct with high confidence.
